mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, name, description, category, thumbnail_url, layout_json, sample_data, is_public, is_system, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meta.report_template (tenant_id, name, description, category, thumbnail_url, layout_json, sample_data, is_public, is_system, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{layoutJson}::jsonb, #{sampleData}::jsonb, #{isPublic}, #{isSystem}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE meta.report_template SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, layout_json = #{layoutJson}::jsonb, sample_data = #{sampleData}::jsonb, is_public = #{isPublic}, is_system = #{isSystem}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
